name: @ai-sdk/alibaba
description: The **[Alibaba provider](https://ai-sdk.dev/providers/ai-sdk-providers/alibaba)** for the [AI SDK](https://ai-sdk.dev/docs) contains language model support for [Alibaba Cloud Model Studio](https://modelstudio.console.alibabacloud.com/), including the Qwen
